caption: A group of people wearing aprons and gloves are engaged in the traditional Korean communal activity of making kimchi, handling salted napa cabbage and red chili paste on a large table.
A person wearing an apron and black gloves is holding a piece of seasoned napa cabbage over a bowl filled with kimchi, showcasing the traditional Korean communal practice of kimjang.
A group of individuals dressed in traditional white hanbok are waving the Taegeukgi, celebrating a significant event with raised flags and smiles.
The image depicts a group of individuals dressed in traditional Korean attire, including hanbok, and holding the Taegeukgi, symbolizing the Korean independence movement.

The image depicts a person wearing a vibrant red Jeontonghonrye, a traditional Korean wedding hanbok, adorned with intricate floral patterns and a decorative headpiece, standing indoors near an open door.
In this image, a couple dressed in traditional Korean hanbok is seated before a ritual table adorned with various items, symbolizing a traditional Korean wedding ceremony known as Jeontonghonrye.

The image depicts a traditional Korean ancestral rite (Jesa) setup with a neatly arranged ritual table featuring various food offerings, including fruits, pastries, and a teapot, set against a backdrop of calligraphy panels.
A Korean family is performing an ancestral rite (Jesa) in their home, kneeling and bowing deeply before a ritual table adorned with food offerings.
A group of individuals is participating in a Seongmyo ceremony, standing in a line and bowing in respect at an outdoor memorial site.
A group of individuals dressed in formal attire is participating in a Seongmyo ceremony at a Korean cemetery, standing respectfully near a grave marker adorned with offerings and flags.
The image shows Cheomseongdae, a Korean stone observatory, illuminated at night, featuring a cylindrical stacked-stone tower with a square top frame, standing in an open field.
The image shows Cheomseongdae, a Korean stone observatory, featuring a cylindrical stacked-stone tower with a square top frame, situated in an open field under a clear sky.
The image showcases the Gyeongbokgung Palace at night, illuminated against a deep blue sky, highlighting its traditional wooden pavilion architecture with upturned eaves and vibrant dancheong colors.

The image depicts the Gyeongbokgung Palace, a traditional Korean royal palace, featuring wooden pavilions with upturned eaves and vibrant dancheong paintwork, set against a backdrop of stone platforms and lush greenery.
이 이미지는 서울에서 복원된 도심 강가를 보여주는 청계천의 모습으로, 바위로 둘러싸인 얕은 물과 그 옆에 걷는 길이 보입니다.
The image shows a statue of Admiral Yi Sun-shin, a Korean naval hero, standing on a pedestal in a plaza surrounded by modern buildings and trees.
Two individuals are performing a Jeol, a traditional Korean formal deep bow, in front of an altar adorned with flowers and a framed portrait.
In the image, two children dressed in traditional hanbok are performing a Jeol, a Korean formal deep bow, while an adult observes nearby.
In the image, a group of people dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are engaged in a Jeol and Sebae ritual, kneeling and bowing deeply with their hands on the floor.
A group of individuals stands in front of a statue of Sejongdaewang, wearing traditional white uniforms and black skirts, with a large golden globe at their feet.
The image shows a statue of Sejongdaewang, King Sejong the Great, seated in royal Joseon robes with a winged crown, illuminated at night with Korean text and flags in the background.
A person is flying a colorful kite in a park, enjoying the Yeon-nalligi tradition.
A person is flying a kite in a park, enjoying the outdoors under a clear sky.
A group of people is gathered around a colorful floral-patterned cloth, engaging in a traditional Korean game called Yutnori, which involves wooden sticks and a game board with circular stations.
Two children dressed in hanbok are sitting on the floor, playing yutnori, a traditional Korean game involving wooden sticks and a game board.
여러 명의 여성이 한복을 입고 큰 원형으로 손을 잡고 춤을 추는 모습이 보입니다.
The image depicts a group of women performing Ganggangsullae, a traditional Korean circle dance, dressed in hanbok and holding hands in a circular formation on a stage under a full moon.
The image depicts a performer dressed in traditional Korean attire, including a brightly colored robe and a mask, engaging in a masked dance-drama known as Talchum.
The image displays a collection of intricately painted wooden masks, each with unique facial expressions, typical of the traditional Korean masked dance-drama known as Talchum.
The image shows a bowl of ramyeon, featuring yellow curly noodles in an orange-red broth, accompanied by chopsticks resting on the rim.
The image shows a pot of ramyeon, a Korean instant noodle dish with yellow curly noodles in an orange-red broth, accompanied by a container of kimchi on the side.
The image shows a box containing neatly arranged gimbap, which are Korean seaweed rice rolls, sliced into round pieces and topped with sesame seeds.
The image shows a plate of wanja-jeon, Korean pan-fried meatballs, with small round golden-brown patties coated in an egg batter.
The image displays a variety of Hangwa, traditional Korean confections, featuring small decorative pieces in pastel colors and pressed floral or geometric patterns.
The image displays a box of Hangwa, traditional Korean confections, featuring an array of colorful, textured squares with decorative floral elements.
The image shows a bowl of Yaksik, a traditional Korean sweet rice dish, featuring a glossy mound of sticky glutinous rice with chestnuts and jujubes.
The image displays a plate of yakgwa, small, flower-shaped or round deep-fried pastries with a dark golden-brown glossy glaze, garnished with green leaves and small white flowers.
The image shows a dish of Bulgogi, featuring thinly sliced beef with a glossy dark-brown glaze, served in a large pan with vegetables and broth.

The image shows a bowl of tteokguk, a traditional Korean New Year dish, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes (tteok) and crescent-shaped dumplings (mandu), garnished with green onions, red chili pepper, and other toppings.
The image shows a bowl of tteokguk and mandu soup, a traditional Korean New Year dish, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes and crescent-shaped dumplings.
The image shows a plate of Japchae, featuring translucent brown noodles mixed with colorful julienned vegetables and topped with sesame seeds.
The image depicts a traditional Korean building with a tiled roof and colorful decorations, situated atop a stone wall, reflecting the architectural style of Namhansanseong fortress.
The image showcases a serene view of Haenggung, featuring traditional Korean architecture with curved tile roofs and dancheong-painted eaves, nestled amidst lush greenery.
The image shows Paldalmun Gate, a gate of Hwaseong Fortress, featuring an arched stone gateway topped with a wooden pavilion and flanked by curved fortress walls.

The image shows a modern architectural structure resembling the EXPO Hanbit Tower, a prominent Korean landmark, with its distinctive disc-shaped deck and pointed spire, set against a backdrop of lush green hills under an overcast sky.

This image depicts a group of soldiers in military uniforms gathered around a truck and other equipment in a rural setting, likely during the Korean War era, as suggested by their attire and the style of the vehicles.
The image depicts a desolate urban landscape with dilapidated buildings and overgrown vegetation, likely representing the aftermath of war, as suggested by the Korean War context.
This image depicts a traditional Korean village scene with thatched-roof houses and people gathered near a body of water, set against a backdrop of rolling hills and greenery.
A family is enjoying a sunny day outdoors, playing Jegichagi, a traditional Korean game involving kicking a small paper-and-coin shuttlecock with their feet.
The child is wearing traditional Korean attire and appears to be playing jegichagi, as indicated by the blue shuttlecock in motion behind them.
